scripts.export-model: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -q -r scripts/requirements.txt && .venv/bin/pip install -q packaging && .venv/bin/python scripts/export_onnx.py
scripts.export-model:scripps: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -q -r scripts/requirements.txt && .venv/bin/pip install -q packaging && .venv/bin/python scripts/export_onnx.py
